blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt one game from Champions League immortality

Arsenal's 4-1 demolition of Tottenham puts them five points clear at the top. Barcelona cruised 3-0 in La Liga. Norwegian sport has one focus now: Bodo/Glimt at San Siro — 3-1 up, one night from history.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL second legs to watch
items: ⚽ Tue 18:45 — Club Brugge at Atlético Madrid — all square after leg one, total knockout
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Monaco at PSG — 3-2 to PSG, one away goal flips this French derby
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Benfica at Real Madrid — Real's narrow lead, Estádio da Luz under pressure
